\tzpentry{ID5776}{Trawin Topology Unified Field Theory Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5776 introduces Trawin Topology Unified Field Theory Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \varepsilon = \left(\frac{M_{\text{Moon}}}{M_\oplus}\right) \left(\frac{R_\oplus}{d}\right)^{3} (1 + k_{2}), \]
